ValidationRule.description: Blocked user to save update record status to In service if no account is present
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$User.BypassValidationRules__c, ISBLANK(Platform__c), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request", OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Client Delivery"), ISPICKVAL(Type,"Solvency") ), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'In Service'), ISCHANGED(Status), Total_Multi_Contacts__c = 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please insert at least one Multi Contact record
